name: jarvis-command
description: UNYKORN JARVIS command HUD — hail / storm / law

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.deploy:hail: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=jarvis-hail --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:storm: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=jarvis-storm --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:law: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=jarvis-law --commit-dirty=true
